cross_cutting_tasks.input: validation_metrics.json, analysis campaign summary precision/bottleneck breakdown
selected hypothesis citations and literature scouting report
cross_cutting_tasks.output: BibTeX entries for FA4, Blackwell microbenchmarks, and white-box modeling methodology

quality_gates_for_write: Every numerical claim must trace to validation_metrics.json or combined_predictions.csv.
Figures and tables must be generated from the experiment output set, not redrawn from memory.
Limitations must appear verbatim or by reference in the manuscript.
The manuscript must not claim real-silicon accuracy.

section_jobs.evidence_limit: Use only supported claims from the claim-evidence boundary.
section_jobs.job: One-paragraph summary of problem, approach, key numbers (4.50% MAPE, +17.7 pp, 100% within 30%, 100% bottleneck accuracy), and implication.

section_jobs.evidence_limit: Cite FA4 paper and Blackwell microbenchmarks; do not claim silicon validation.
section_jobs.job: Motivate white-box modeling, state the research goal, preview the three corrections, list three contributions, and provide a roadmap.

section_jobs.evidence_limit: Cite arXiv references from the selected hypothesis; keep claims about prior work verifiable.
section_jobs.job: Position against FlashAttention family, GPU roofline/analytical models, emulation/simulation, and black-box ML surrogates; identify the gap the paper fills.

section_jobs.evidence_limit: Ground constants in constants.py and B200 hardware spec; note approximations.
section_jobs.job: Present workload computation, baseline roofline, occupancy correction, effective bandwidth curves, precision-specific throughput, calibration, and bottleneck labeling. Include a pipeline figure.
section_jobs.required_displays: Figure 3: predictor pipeline; equations for occupancy factor and effective bandwidth.

section_jobs.evidence_limit: State emulator caveats and fairness rules explicitly.
section_jobs.job: Describe the synthetic matrix, calibration/validation split, emulator, predictor variants, calibration procedure, and metrics.

section_jobs.evidence_limit: All numbers from validation_metrics.json and combined_predictions.csv.
section_jobs.job: Report ablation table, combined-model metrics, precision breakdown, per-bottleneck residuals, and worst-case analysis. Reference Figures 1 and 2.

section_jobs.evidence_limit: Mirror the analysis campaign summary caveats.
section_jobs.job: List emulator ground truth, synthetic matrix, approximate tile sizes/occupancy, and calibration-transfer risk.
Restate the contribution, summarize the main result, and outline silicon validation and extension work.

summary: Section-level writing jobs derived from the validated paper outline for the FA4 B200 white-box runtime predictor manuscript.
title: Section Writing Plan: FA4 B200 White-Box Runtime Predictor
